title: EternalMenus | 1.8-1.21.8
description: Simple and easy-to-use menu plugin | Flexible and easy
body:
![TitleIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81f04d87c6c2a08daf993cdfa9bdcc7e82e15594_0.webp)
[Wiki](https://www.spigotmc.org/wiki/eternalmenus/) | [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)

ABOUT EMenus
EternalMenus has a lot of features that allow you to make a very good menu, compared to other menu plugins, this plugin stands out for its high degree of customization, stability and useful functions Support for Placeholder API (optional)

Commands |
/emenus open [menu name]
Open a menu for you!
/emenus reload
Load menu and language information as well as a configuration file
Config |
You can add unlimited menus and simple configurations. Even you can change every key name to suit your preferences!
